creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Your solution does not solve the problem if 
the user updates by using a package. 

This looks like a problem inside nscd, 
creation of about a hundred ports (145 UIDs) will break. 

Is ther a global solution? 
nscd shuld clear its cache when the accounts are removed. 

I would not expect a nscd allows a user to login after 
he has been removed.
